# Down To Earth AI

> AI receptionist and lead generation services built specifically for UK tradesmen. Founded by Jeff — 25 years in the trade. Every service is affordable with no contracts, 30-day money-back guarantee. Based in the UK, serving UK tradesmen only.

Down To Earth AI provides four core products for 13 trade specialisms: AI Receptionist (phone answering + website chat included, additional channels available), Lead Generation Websites (150-300 page SEO sites), AI Marketing (photos-in, content-out), and Custom AI Automations. All services are done-for-you, GDPR compliant, and designed for sole traders and small trade businesses.

## Core Products

- [AI Receptionist for Tradesmen](https://downtoearthai.co.uk/ai-receptionist-for-tradesmen): AI receptionist with phone answering and website chat included. Additional channels (WhatsApp, SMS, email, social media, missed call text-back) available at £23/channel. £45/mo, 100 minutes talk time included.
- [Lead Generation Websites for Tradesmen](https://downtoearthai.co.uk/ai-lead-generation-websites-for-tradesmen): 150-300 page SEO websites that rank on Google for local trade searches. From £997 one-off.
- [AI Marketing for Tradesmen](https://downtoearthai.co.uk/ai-marketing-for-tradesmen): Send job photos, AI creates blog posts, social media content, and Google Business updates. £99/mo.
- [Custom AI Automations for Tradesmen](https://downtoearthai.co.uk/custom-ai-automations-for-tradesmen): Bespoke AI workflows built around how your trade business operates. Bespoke pricing.
- [AI Lead Generation System](https://downtoearthai.co.uk/ai-lead-generation-for-tradesmen): How all four products work together as a complete lead generation flywheel.

## AI Receptionist Channels

- [AI Phone Answering](https://downtoearthai.co.uk/ai-phone-answering-service-for-tradesmen): Voice AI answers calls within seconds using your business name (included in base plan)
- [AI Website Chat](https://downtoearthai.co.uk/ai-website-chat-bot-for-tradesmen): Live chat widget with AI conversations (included in base plan)
- [AI WhatsApp Messaging](https://downtoearthai.co.uk/ai-whatsapp-messaging-service-for-tradesmen): Instant professional WhatsApp replies (£23/mo add-on)
- [AI SMS Messaging](https://downtoearthai.co.uk/ai-sms-messaging-service-for-tradesmen): Professional SMS acknowledgments (£23/mo add-on)
- [AI Email Response](https://downtoearthai.co.uk/ai-email-response-service-for-tradesmen): Instant email acknowledgments (£23/mo add-on)
- [AI Facebook Messenger](https://downtoearthai.co.uk/ai-facebook-messenger-service-for-tradesmen): Instant Facebook page message replies (£23/mo add-on)
- [AI Instagram DMs](https://downtoearthai.co.uk/ai-instagram-messaging-service-for-tradesmen): Instant Instagram DM replies (£23/mo add-on)
- [AI Google Business Profile](https://downtoearthai.co.uk/ai-google-business-profile-optimization-for-tradesmen): Profile optimization and review generation (£23/mo add-on)
- [AI Missed Call Text-Back](https://downtoearthai.co.uk/ai-missed-call-text-back-for-tradesmen): Automatic text when calls are missed (£23/mo add-on)

## Trades Served

- [Plumbers](https://downtoearthai.co.uk/ai-receptionist-for-plumbers): AI receptionist and lead gen for plumbing businesses
- [Electricians](https://downtoearthai.co.uk/ai-receptionist-for-electricians): AI receptionist and lead gen for electrical businesses
- [Locksmiths](https://downtoearthai.co.uk/ai-receptionist-for-locksmiths): AI receptionist and lead gen for locksmith businesses
- [Gas Engineers](https://downtoearthai.co.uk/ai-receptionist-for-gas-engineers): AI receptionist and lead gen for gas engineering businesses
- [Roofers](https://downtoearthai.co.uk/ai-receptionist-for-roofers): AI receptionist and lead gen for roofing businesses
- [Builders](https://downtoearthai.co.uk/ai-receptionist-for-builders): AI receptionist and lead gen for building businesses
- [Drainage Engineers](https://downtoearthai.co.uk/ai-receptionist-for-drainage-engineers): AI receptionist and lead gen for drainage businesses
- [Glaziers](https://downtoearthai.co.uk/ai-receptionist-for-glaziers): AI receptionist and lead gen for glazing businesses
- [HVAC Engineers](https://downtoearthai.co.uk/ai-receptionist-for-hvac-engineers): AI receptionist and lead gen for HVAC businesses
- [Alarm Installers](https://downtoearthai.co.uk/ai-receptionist-for-alarm-installers): AI receptionist and lead gen for alarm and security businesses
- [Pest Control](https://downtoearthai.co.uk/ai-receptionist-for-pest-control): AI receptionist and lead gen for pest control businesses
- [Garage Door Engineers](https://downtoearthai.co.uk/ai-receptionist-for-garage-door-engineers): AI receptionist and lead gen for garage door businesses
- [Appliance Repair](https://downtoearthai.co.uk/ai-receptionist-for-appliance-repair-engineers): AI receptionist and lead gen for appliance repair businesses
